summary: Tested mobile PWA redesign with expandable drill-down UI and new chat system for iteration 38. All backend tests passed (18/18). All frontend features verified working: OTP login, parent dashboard with team cards and expandable sections, team drill-down (Events/Roster/Staff), player profile, event detail with Going/Not Going, chat system (team chats, conversations, messaging), profile page with edit mode, schedule page with calendar, and all 4 bottom nav tabs.

issues: 'Made with Emergent' badge overlaps bottom nav - requires force=True or JS click for reliable navigation. Known issue from previous iteration.

test_credentials: Parent OTP login: phone='99555666' at /app/login. OTP returned in debug response field 'otp_debug'. Coach: 99222222, Player: 99333333.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Mobile PWA with expandable drill-down UI and chat system complete. All features working: (1) OTP Login: request OTP, get code from otp_debug, verify. (2) Parent Dashboard: team cards, 'Τα παιδιά μου' section, quick stats (€ currency), upcoming events. (3) Team Drill-Down: expandable sections (Επερχόμενα/Ρόστερ/Τεχνικό Επιτελείο/Ανακοινώσεις). (4) Event Detail: Going/Not Going buttons work. (5) Player Profile: own kid shows stats, others show restricted. (6) Chat System: team chats, conversations, send/receive messages, polling for new messages. (7) Profile Page: avatar upload, edit mode (name/email editable, phone locked), logout. (8) Schedule Page: calendar view with events. (9) Bottom Nav: 4 tabs (Αρχική/Πρόγραμμα/Μηνύματα/Προφίλ). Navigation uses internal state via setActiveTab, not URL routing. Use JS click or force=True for bottom nav due to Emergent badge overlap.
